name: Launch inventory count cycle
description: Install a count cadence for high-risk lines so stock truth, 86 decisions, and loss reviews are built on trusted numbers instead of intuition.
source_ref: core-v2: tighten control loops around the items most likely to distort service or margin
entry_conditions: Counts drift, 86 surprises, or stock variance already affect service confidence.
The venue can identify a limited high-risk count set instead of counting everything poorly.
contraindications: Do not launch a count cycle with no variance review or ownership loop behind it.
Do not start with full-inventory perfection when only a few lines drive most of the damage.
proof_of_completion: A fixed cadence, owner, and scope exist for high-risk inventory lines.
Variance thresholds and follow-up actions are documented.
Count output now feeds 86 decisions or control reviews rather than sitting unused.
